pages.raw_text:
The local unions are Just begin
ming to get in shape to fight the
Washington Water Power company.
1t takes some time little time to
notify members of the various
unions, as quite a number of these
bodies hold meetings but once a
month. Several of the local unions,
however, have already acted in re-
gard to keeping members from pa
tronizing the company, including
the Corbin Park and Union Park
street car lines and the Natatorium
park pleasure resort of the local
monopoly.


Hereafter On every pleasant Sun.
day and on holidays and special
occasions, such as the opening of
special amusement features the
electrical workers committee will
be assisted by committees from
several of the local unions in see
ing that members of unions and
their families remain away from
the park. There is no doubt but
that the local unions mean to en-
force their laws in regard to patron
izing anything on the unfair list so
far as the local monopoly Is con-
cerned and 1t will be an easy task
to count the members of organized
labor who will patronize the park
In the future.
